## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Security hardening

## Validation

Describe how you tested this change.

- [ ] Backend runs locally (`python -m app.main` from `backend/`)
- [ ] Frontend builds (`yarn build` in `frontend/`)
- [ ] Manual behavior tested

## Screenshots (if UI change)

Add before/after screenshots.

## Checklist

- [ ] I did not commit secrets or `.env`
- [ ] I updated docs for behavior/config changes
- [ ] I considered security impact
- [ ] I kept the change scoped and reviewable
